arts.ttl: The key quotes from Oliver Glasner’s pre-Fulham press conference
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner faced the media in his pre-match press conference ahead of Palace’s short trip to west London to take on Fulham on Saturday, 22nd February (KO: 15:00 GMT) - the first of four games in 15 days.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss provides Eberechi Eze injury update ahead of Fulham clash
arts.sum: “It was a good week for him [Eze] personally, and he’s getting better and better with his foot,” said Glasner. Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner says Eberechi Eze is ready to start against Fulham on Saturday.

arts.sum: Crystal Palace are already preparing for the summer transfer window, with Midtjylland striker Franculino Dju emerging as a prime target to bolster their attacking arsenal.
